Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine and chloride, low total CO₂, and significant proteinuria with abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, bilirubin, ketones, protein). These suggest impaired renal function, possible chronic kidney disease, and tubular dysfunction. HbA1c is low, excluding diabetes. Recommend nephrology evaluation and further workup for renal and possible hepatic involvement.
